## Verses (35)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | And Eliphaz the Temanite made answer and said, | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Will a wise man make answer with knowledge of no value, or will he give birth to the east wind? | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Will he make arguments with words in which is no profit, and with sayings which have no value? | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | Truly, you make the fear of God without effect, so that the time of quiet worship before God is made less by your outcry. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | For your mouth is guided by your sin, and you have taken the tongue of the false for yourself. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | It is by your mouth, even yours, that you are judged to be in the wrong, and not by me; and your lips give witness against you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | Were you the first man to come into the world? or did you come into being before the hills? | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Were you present at the secret meeting of God? and have you taken all wisdom for yourself? | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | What knowledge have you which we have not? is there anything in your mind which is not in ours? | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | With us are men who are grey-haired and full of years, much older than your father. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | Are the comforts of God not enough for you, and the gentle word which was said to you? | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | Why is your heart uncontrolled, and why are your eyes lifted up; | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | So that you are turning your spirit against God, and letting such words go out of your mouth? | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | What is man, that he may be clean? and how may the son of woman be upright? | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | Truly, he puts no faith in his holy ones, and the heavens are not clean in his eyes; | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | How much less one who is disgusting and unclean, a man who takes in evil like water! | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | Take note and give ear to my words; and I will say what I have seen: | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | (The things which wise men have got from their fathers, and have not kept secret from us; | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | For only to them was the land given, and no strange people were among them:) | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | The evil man is in pain all his days, and the number of the years stored up for the cruel is small. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | A sound of fear is in his ears; in time of peace destruction will come on him: | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | He has no hope of coming safe out of the dark, and his fate will be the sword; | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | He is wandering about in search of bread, saying, Where is it? and he is certain that the day of trouble is ready for him: | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | He is greatly in fear of the dark day, trouble and pain overcome him: | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
| [25](BBE.md#v25) | Because his hand is stretched out against God, and his heart is lifted up against the Ruler of all, | [WEB](WEB.md#v25) · [KJV](KJV.md#v25) · [ASV](ASV.md#v25) |
| [26](BBE.md#v26) | Running against him like a man of war, covered by his thick breastplate; even like a king ready for the fight, | [WEB](WEB.md#v26) · [KJV](KJV.md#v26) · [ASV](ASV.md#v26) |
| [27](BBE.md#v27) | Because his face is covered with fat, and his body has become thick; | [WEB](WEB.md#v27) · [KJV](KJV.md#v27) · [ASV](ASV.md#v27) |
| [28](BBE.md#v28) | And he has made his resting-place in the towns which have been pulled down, in houses where no man had a right to be, whose fate was to become masses of broken walls. | [WEB](WEB.md#v28) · [KJV](KJV.md#v28) · [ASV](ASV.md#v28) |
| [29](BBE.md#v29) | He does not get wealth for himself, and is unable to keep what he has got; the heads of his grain are not bent down to the earth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v29) · [KJV](KJV.md#v29) · [ASV](ASV.md#v29) |
| [30](BBE.md#v30) | He does not come out of the dark; his branches are burned by the flame, and the wind takes away his bud. | [WEB](WEB.md#v30) · [KJV](KJV.md#v30) · [ASV](ASV.md#v30) |
| [31](BBE.md#v31) | Let him not put his hope in what is false, falling into error: for he will get deceit as his reward. | [WEB](WEB.md#v31) · [KJV](KJV.md#v31) · [ASV](ASV.md#v31) |
| [32](BBE.md#v32) | His branch is cut off before its time, and his leaf is no longer green. | [WEB](WEB.md#v32) · [KJV](KJV.md#v32) · [ASV](ASV.md#v32) |
| [33](BBE.md#v33) | He is like a vine whose grapes do not come to full growth, or an olive-tree dropping its flowers. | [WEB](WEB.md#v33) · [KJV](KJV.md#v33) · [ASV](ASV.md#v33) |
| [34](BBE.md#v34) | For the band of the evil-doers gives no fruit, and the tents of those who give wrong decisions for reward are burned with fire. | [WEB](WEB.md#v34) · [KJV](KJV.md#v34) · [ASV](ASV.md#v34) |
| [35](BBE.md#v35) | Evil has made them with child, and they give birth to trouble; and the fruit of their body is shame for themselves. | [WEB](WEB.md#v35) · [KJV](KJV.md#v35) · [ASV](ASV.md#v35) |
